title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
